info.name: 22. Use Case - Registrasi Stroke
info.description:
For **complete repository for all SATUSEHAT use-cases** please access our public workspaces : [Postman Workspaces](https://s.id/PostmanSATUSEHAT) For **detailed SATUSEHAT use-cases import link** please see : [Postman Public Kemkes Link](https://link.kemkes.go.id/PostmanSATUSEHAT) Any information about SATUSEHAT FHIR Profile could be accessed through [Simplifier FHIR Profile](https://simplifier.net/guide/SATUSEHAT-FHIR-R4-Implementation-Guide/Home/FHIRProfiles?version=current) | Folder History | **Editor** | **Date** | | --- | --- | --- | | Versi Pertama - API sesuai dengan Playbook Registrasi Stroke V1.2 | [Sania Fitria](https://mailto:sania.fitria@dto.kemkes.go.id)

[Thomas Chaidir](https://mailto:thomas.chaidir@kemkes.go.id) | 16 Jul 2024 | | Versi Kedua - API sesuai dengan Playbook Registrasi Stroke V1.3 | [Sania Fitria](https://mailto:sania.fitria@dto.kemkes.go.id)

[Thomas Chaidir](https://mailto:thomas.chaidir@kemkes.go.id) | 6 Aug 2024 |
